title: Accessibility progress reports at IRCC - Canada.ca
content:
## Accessibility progress reports at IRCC
Our accessibility plan reflects our organization’s policies, programs, practices and services in relation to identifying and removing accessibility barriers and preventing new barriers in these areas.
Our progress reports describe our progress against our commitments in the accessibility plan.
- 2024 Accessibility progress report for IRCC
- 2023 Accessibility progress report for IRCC
